title: Add Hash, Sub, Neg impls to Gf2mElement
description:
Add missing trait implementations to Gf2mElement required for FiniteField conformance:

- `Hash`: hash only `self.value` (field identity is a precondition enforced by Arc::ptr_eq at arithmetic time, not part of the hash).
- `Sub for Gf2mElement` and `Sub for &Gf2mElement`: delegate to Add (characteristic 2: subtraction = addition = XOR).
- `Neg for Gf2mElement` and `Neg for &Gf2mElement`: return self.clone() (characteristic 2: negation is identity).

These are prerequisites for implementing FiniteField on Gf2mElement.

Location: crates/gf2-core/src/gf2m/field.rs
